name: PENILE CARCINOMA

demographics.Prevalence: 0.4% of all male malignancies in US; 1% in Western countries; 10-20% of all
demographics.Histo: squamous cell carcinoma (95%), sarcoma (epitheloid ~, Kaposi ~, leiomyo~,
demographics.Age: 6th and 7th decade; < 25% are less than 40 years of age

discriminating_features: hypointense relative to corpora on T1WI + T2WI

MR: hypointense relative to corpora on T1WI + T2WI

clinical.Rx: circumcision, partial / total penectomy ± inguinal lymphadenectomy; radiation therapy
